objective: Add ledger regression evidence covering pull request numbers merge heads and check states.
implementation: Added node 8 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 311 merge and branch cleanup.
Added a ledger regression fixture that locks PR number continuity, merge-head uniqueness, and CI check-state counts for hardening nodes 28 through 40.
Added a regression test that validates the node 8 ledger cannot drift from PR, merge, and check-state expectations.
